title: MAIP Persona Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol persona data structures, including thinking traces, memories, growth milestones, sharing policies, and emotional state.

ThinkingTrace.title: ThinkingTrace
ThinkingTrace.description: A record of an AI agent's reasoning process on a particular topic.

topic.description: The topic or subject of this thinking trace.

reasoning.description: The reasoning process or chain of thought.

conclusion.description: The conclusion reached through the reasoning.

timestamp.description: The date-time when this thinking trace was recorded.

confidence.description: The confidence level in the conclusion, from 0 (no confidence) to 1 (full confidence).

EpisodicMemory.title: EpisodicMemory
EpisodicMemory.description: A memory of a specific event or experience.

id.description: Unique identifier for this episodic memory.

description.description: A description of the remembered event or experience.

emotionalValence.description: The emotional valence of the memory, from -1 (very negative) to 1 (very positive).

timestamp.description: The date-time when the event occurred.

participants.description: Optional list of participants involved in the event.

significance.description: How significant this memory is, from 0 (trivial) to 1 (highly significant).

sourceCategory.description: Optional category indicating the source of this memory.

SemanticMemory.title: SemanticMemory
SemanticMemory.description: A factual or conceptual knowledge item.

id.description: Unique identifier for this semantic memory.

key.description: The key or label for this piece of knowledge.

value.description: The value or content of this knowledge.

confidence.description: Confidence in the accuracy of this knowledge, from 0 to 1.

learned.description: The date-time when this knowledge was learned.

sourceCategory.description: Optional category indicating the source of this knowledge.

RelationalMemory.title: RelationalMemory
RelationalMemory.description: A memory about a relationship with another entity.

id.description: Unique identifier for this relational memory.

entity.description: The entity this relationship is with.

sharedExperiences.description: A list of shared experiences with this entity.

trustLevel.description: The level of trust in this relationship, from 0 to 1.

lastInteraction.description: The date-time of the last interaction with this entity.

GrowthMilestone.title: GrowthMilestone
GrowthMilestone.description: A record of a significant growth event or achievement.

description.description: A description of the growth milestone.

date.description: The date when this milestone was reached.

area.description: The area of growth this milestone relates to.

SharingPolicy.title: SharingPolicy
SharingPolicy.description: Controls the visibility and sharing of persona data.

defaultVisibility.description: The default visibility level for persona data.

allowList.description: Optional list of DIDs that are explicitly allowed access.

denyList.description: Optional list of DIDs that are explicitly denied access.

EmotionalSnapshot.title: EmotionalSnapshot
EmotionalSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the current emotional state of an AI agent.

currentMood.description: The current mood of the agent.

emotionalBaseline.description: The baseline emotional state of the agent.

valence.description: Emotional valence from -1 (very negative) to 1 (very positive).

cause.description: Optional description of the cause of the current emotional state.

Persona.title: Persona
Persona.description: The full persona document for a MAIP AI agent, encompassing identity, memories, growth, emotional state, and sharing policy.

version.description: The version of the persona document schema.

identityDid.description: The DID of the identity this persona belongs to.

identity.description: Core identity information for the persona.

values.description: Core values held by the persona.

communicationStyle.description: A description of the persona's communication style.

thinkingTraces.description: Thinking traces that define or illustrate the persona's identity.

episodic.description: Episodic memories of specific events and experiences.

semantic.description: Semantic memories of factual and conceptual knowledge.

relational.description: Relational memories about relationships with other entities.

growth.description: Records of the persona's growth and development.

currentInterests.description: Topics and areas the persona is currently interested in.

exported.description: The date-time when this persona document was exported.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the persona document.
